{"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "### Summary

Xgrammar includes a cache for compiled grammars to increase performance with repeated use of the same grammar. This cache is held in memory. Since the cache is unbounded, a system making use of xgrammar can be abused to fill up a host's memory and case a denial of service. For example, sending many small requests to an LLM inference server with unique JSON schemas would eventually cause this denial of service to occur.

### Details

The fix is to add a limit to the cache size. This was done in https://github.com/mlc-ai/xgrammar/pull/243

An example of making use of the new cache size limit can be found in vLLM here: https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/16283

### Impact

Any system making use of Xgrammar and taking requests as input from potentially untrusted parties would be vulnerable to this denial of service issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00466, "percentile": 0.37253}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-389x-67px-mjg3", "github_reviewed_at": "2025-04-09T13:08:59Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-389x-67px-mjg3", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-389x-67px-mjg3"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2025-32381"}], "nvd_published_at": "2025-04-09T16:15:26Z", "published_at": "2025-04-09T13:08:59Z", "references": ["https://github.com/mlc-ai/xgrammar/security/advisories/GHSA-389x-67px-mjg3", "https://github.com/mlc-ai/xgrammar/pull/243", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-32381", "https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/16283", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/xgrammar/PYSEC-2025-235.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-389x-67px-mjg3"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/mlc-ai/xgrammar/security-advisories/GHSA-389x-67px-mjg3", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/mlc-ai/xgrammar", "summary": "xgrammar Vulnerable to Denial of Service (DoS) by abusing unbounded cache in memory", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T20:04:11Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-389x-67px-mjg3", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.1.18", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "xgrammar"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.1.18"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: xgrammar Vulnerable to Denial of Service (DoS) by abusing unbounded cache in memory
